free_text: The (d,p) reaction on 23Na in the deuteron energy
range from 1.0 to 2.5 MeV
A thin layer of Na2CO3 deposited on a silver foil
(0.05 mu-m) has been used as a target. The targets
were about 20 keV thick for 2.0 MeV deuterons.
All experimental results obtained were normalized, on
the one hand, to the current integrator readings and
to the other hand, to the readings of the monitor
which placed at an angle 135 degr. with respect to the
deuteron beam.
The values for the levels compiler
took from the DB ENSDF. They are absent in the article
